data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond adds to list of acquisitions with F9 Brands deal
data.description: The retailer said it expects the roughly $150 million deal to close after an annual shareholder meeting in May 2026, as well as following "customary due diligence, definitive documentation, and regulatory approvals if needed."

data.title: Amazon Pharmacy to sell Eli Lilly GLP-1 pill with same-day delivery
data.description: Amazon is competing with leading Health & Beauty retailers in selling GLP-1 products online, including Hims & Hers. Popular comparable products include Ozempic and Rybelsus for diabetes, which Danish pharmaceutical company Novo Nordisk sells under the brand name Wegovy.

data.title: Levi Strauss grows ecommerce, overall sales in Q1
data.description: New consumers are primarily discovering Levi Strauss through digital channels and tend to skew younger than other customers, the retailer's CEO said.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What is AI's role in resale growth?
data.description: Established online players and young startups see specific opportunities for AI to fuel growing resale demand.

data.title: Rezolve Ai takes merger proposal to Commerce.com's shareholders
data.description: Commerce.com board says Rezolve Ai is undervaluing shares in its recent offers to combine the two companies.
